Passwort Reset Anfrage

Wenn Sie dies nicht angefordert haben, können Sie diese E-Mail sicher ignorieren.
Dieser Link läuft in {{ expiry_hours }} Stunden ab.

subject: Rechercher le mot de passe Request
html_content: Rechercher le mot de passe Request Nous avons reçu une demande de réinitialisation de votre mot de passe. Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous pour le réinitialiser. Récupérer le mot de passe Si vous n'avez pas demandé cela, vous pouvez ignorer ce courriel en toute sécurité. Ce lien expirera dans les heures {{ expiry_hours }}. Powered by Spwig
text_content:
Rechercher le mot de passe Request

Nous avons reçu une demande de réinitialisation de votre mot de passe. Cliquez sur le lien ci-dessous pour le réinitialiser.

{{ reset_url }}

Si vous n'avez pas demandé cela, vous pouvez ignorer ce courriel en toute sécurité.
Ce lien expirera dans les heures {{ expiry_hours }}.

subject: パスワードリクエスト
html_content: パスワードリクエスト あなたのパスワードをリセットするよう求めてきました。 下のボタンをクリックしてリセットします。 パスワードリセット あなたがこれを要求していない場合は、安全にこのメールを無視することができます。 このリンクは {{ expiry_hours }} 時間内に終了します。 Powered by Spwig
text_content:
パスワードリクエスト

あなたのパスワードをリセットするよう求めてきました。 下のリンクをクリックしてリセットします。

{{ reset_url }}

あなたがこれを要求していない場合は、安全にこのメールを無視することができます。
このリンクは {{ expiry_hours }} 時間内に終了します。

subject: Requerimento de Reset de Senha
html_content: Requerimento de Reset de Senha Recebemos um pedido para redefinir sua senha. Clique no botão abaixo para resetá-lo. Resetando a senha Se você não solicitou isso, você pode ignorar com segurança este e-mail. Este link expirará em {{ expiry_hours }} horas. Powered by Spwig
text_content:
Requerimento de Reset de Senha

Recebemos um pedido para redefinir sua senha. Clique no link abaixo para resetá-lo.

{{ reset_url }}

Se você não solicitou isso, você pode ignorar com segurança este e-mail.
Este link expirará em {{ expiry_hours }} horas.

subject: Wie war dein Kauf? Hinterlasse eine Bewertung
html_content:
<mjml>
  <mj-head>
    <mj-attributes>
      <mj-text font-family="Arial, sans-serif" line-height="1.6" />
      <mj-all font-family="Arial, sans-serif" />
    </mj-attributes>
  </mj-head>
  <mj-body background-color="#f8f9fa">
    <!-- Header -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="40px 20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="28px" font-weight="bold" color="#212529" align="center">Wir lieben Ihr Feedback!</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" color="#6c757d" align="center" padding-top="10px">Befehl #{{ order_number }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Persönliche Botschaft -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" line-height="1.8">Hi {{ customer_name }},</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" padding-top="10px" line-height="1.8">Wir hoffen, dass Sie Ihren jüngsten Kauf genießen! Ihr Feedback hilft uns, uns zu verbessern und hilft anderen Kunden, fundierte Entscheidungen zu treffen.</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Produkte zur Überprüfung -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" padding-bottom="15px">Überprüfen Sie Ihren Kauf</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    {% for item in items %}
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="15px 20px" css-class="review-item">
      <mj-column width="100px">
        <mj-image src="{{ item.product_thumbnail_url }}" alt="{{ item.name }}" width="80px" border-radius="6px" />
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="60%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-text font-size="14px" font-weight="600" color="#212529">
          {{ item.name }}
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="12px" color="#6c757d" padding-top="5px">Qty: {{ item.quantity }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="30%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-button
          href="{{ item.review_url }}"
          background-color="#007bff"
          color="#ffffff"
          font-size="12px"
          border-radius="4px"
          padding="8px 16px"
          inner-padding="8px 16px"
        >Schreiben Sie Bewertung</mj-button>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endfor %}

    <!-- Incentive (if offered) -->
    {% if incentive_offered %}
    <mj-section background-color="#e7f3ff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" align="center">🎁 Bonus Belohnung</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" align="center" padding-top="10px">
          {{ incentive_details }}
        </mj-text>
        {% if incentive_code %}
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="bold" color="#007bff" align="center" padding-top="10px">Code: {{ incentive_code }}</mj-text>
        {% endif %}
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endif %}

    <!-- Unterstützung Block -->
    {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}
  </mj-body>
</mjml>

subject: ¿Cómo fue tu compra? Deja una reseña
html_content:
<mjml>
  <mj-head>
    <mj-attributes>
      <mj-text font-family="Arial, sans-serif" line-height="1.6" />
      <mj-all font-family="Arial, sans-serif" />
    </mj-attributes>
  </mj-head>
  <mj-body background-color="#f8f9fa">
    <!-- Header -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="40px 20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="28px" font-weight="bold" color="#212529" align="center">¡Nos encantaría tu feedback!</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" color="#6c757d" align="center" padding-top="10px">Orden #{{ order_number }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Mensaje personal -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" line-height="1.8">¡Hola _PACEHOLDER_0__,</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" padding-top="10px" line-height="1.8">¡Esperamos que disfrutes de tu reciente compra! Su feedback nos ayuda a mejorar y ayuda a otros clientes a tomar decisiones informadas.</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Productos para revisar -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" padding-bottom="15px">Revisa tu compra</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    {% for item in items %}
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="15px 20px" css-class="review-item">
      <mj-column width="100px">
        <mj-image src="{{ item.product_thumbnail_url }}" alt="{{ item.name }}" width="80px" border-radius="6px" />
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="60%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-text font-size="14px" font-weight="600" color="#212529">
          {{ item.name }}
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="12px" color="#6c757d" padding-top="5px">Qty: {{ item.quantity }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="30%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-button
          href="{{ item.review_url }}"
          background-color="#007bff"
          color="#ffffff"
          font-size="12px"
          border-radius="4px"
          padding="8px 16px"
          inner-padding="8px 16px"
        >Escribe la revisión</mj-button>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endfor %}

    <!-- Incentive (if offered) -->
    {% if incentive_offered %}
    <mj-section background-color="#e7f3ff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" align="center">Bonificación de bonificación</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" align="center" padding-top="10px">
          {{ incentive_details }}
        </mj-text>
        {% if incentive_code %}
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="bold" color="#007bff" align="center" padding-top="10px">Código: {{ incentive_code }}</mj-text>
        {% endif %}
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endif %}

    <!-- Bloque de apoyo -->
    {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}
  </mj-body>
</mjml>

subject: Comment s’est passé ton achat? Laisser un commentaire
html_content:
<mjml>
  <mj-head>
    <mj-attributes>
      <mj-text font-family="Arial, sans-serif" line-height="1.6" />
      <mj-all font-family="Arial, sans-serif" />
    </mj-attributes>
  </mj-head>
  <mj-body background-color="#f8f9fa">
    <!-- Header -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="40px 20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="28px" font-weight="bold" color="#212529" align="center">Nous aimerions votre feedback!</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" color="#6c757d" align="center" padding-top="10px">Commande #{{ order_number }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Message personnel -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" line-height="1.8">Bienvenue à la place_0_,</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" padding-top="10px" line-height="1.8">Nous espérons que vous apprécierez votre dernier achat! Vos commentaires nous aident à nous améliorer et aident les autres clients à prendre des décisions éclairées.</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Produits à revoir -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" padding-bottom="15px">Vérifiez votre achat</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    {% for item in items %}
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="15px 20px" css-class="review-item">
      <mj-column width="100px">
        <mj-image src="{{ item.product_thumbnail_url }}" alt="{{ item.name }}" width="80px" border-radius="6px" />
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="60%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-text font-size="14px" font-weight="600" color="#212529">
          {{ item.name }}
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="12px" color="#6c757d" padding-top="5px">Qty : {{ item.quantity }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="30%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-button
          href="{{ item.review_url }}"
          background-color="#007bff"
          color="#ffffff"
          font-size="12px"
          border-radius="4px"
          padding="8px 16px"
          inner-padding="8px 16px"
        >Écrire une revue</mj-button>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endfor %}

    <!-- Incentive (if offered) -->
    {% if incentive_offered %}
    <mj-section background-color="#e7f3ff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" align="center">Bonus de récompense</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" align="center" padding-top="10px">
          {{ incentive_details }}
        </mj-text>
        {% if incentive_code %}
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="bold" color="#007bff" align="center" padding-top="10px">Code : {{ incentive_code }}</mj-text>
        {% endif %}
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endif %}

    <!-- Bloc de soutien -->
    {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}
  </mj-body>
</mjml>

subject: あなたの購入はどうでしたか? コメント Leave a review
html_content:
<mjml>
  <mj-head>
    <mj-attributes>
      <mj-text font-family="Arial, sans-serif" line-height="1.6" />
      <mj-all font-family="Arial, sans-serif" />
    </mj-attributes>
  </mj-head>
  <mj-body background-color="#f8f9fa">
    <!-- ヘッダー -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="40px 20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="28px" font-weight="bold" color="#212529" align="center">あなたのフィードバックが大好き!</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" color="#6c757d" align="center" padding-top="10px">オーダー #{{ order_number }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- 個人メッセージ -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" line-height="1.8">こんにちは! 0 0 0 0 0</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" padding-top="10px" line-height="1.8">最近の購入を楽しんでいただけることを願っています! あなたのフィードバックは私たちに改善を助け、他の顧客が明確な決定を下すのを助けます。</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- 製品レビュー -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" padding-bottom="15px">あなたの購入をレビュー</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    {% for item in items %}
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="15px 20px" css-class="review-item">
      <mj-column width="100px">
        <mj-image src="{{ item.product_thumbnail_url }}" alt="{{ item.name }}" width="80px" border-radius="6px" />
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="60%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-text font-size="14px" font-weight="600" color="#212529">
          {{ item.name }}
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="12px" color="#6c757d" padding-top="5px">トップページ > トップページ > 0</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="30%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-button
          href="{{ item.review_url }}"
          background-color="#007bff"
          color="#ffffff"
          font-size="12px"
          border-radius="4px"
          padding="8px 16px"
          inner-padding="8px 16px"
        >書くレビュー</mj-button>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endfor %}

    <!-- Incentive (if offered) -->
    {% if incentive_offered %}
    <mj-section background-color="#e7f3ff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" align="center">ボーナス賞</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" align="center" padding-top="10px">
          {{ incentive_details }}
        </mj-text>
        {% if incentive_code %}
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="bold" color="#007bff" align="center" padding-top="10px">コード: {{ incentive_code }}</mj-text>
        {% endif %}
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endif %}

    <!-- サポートブロック -->
    {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}
  </mj-body>
</mjml>

subject: Como foi a sua compra? Deixe uma revisão
html_content:
<mjml>
  <mj-head>
    <mj-attributes>
      <mj-text font-family="Arial, sans-serif" line-height="1.6" />
      <mj-all font-family="Arial, sans-serif" />
    </mj-attributes>
  </mj-head>
  <mj-body background-color="#f8f9fa">
    <!-- cabeçalho -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="40px 20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="28px" font-weight="bold" color="#212529" align="center">Gostaríamos do seu feedback!</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" color="#6c757d" align="center" padding-top="10px">Ordem #{{ order_number }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Mensagem pessoal -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" line-height="1.8">Olá pessoal_0_0</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" padding-top="10px" line-height="1.8">Esperamos que você esteja gostando da sua última compra! Seu feedback nos ajuda a melhorar e ajuda outros clientes a tomar decisões informadas.</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    <!-- Produtos para revisão -->
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" padding-bottom="15px">Revise sua compra</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>

    {% for item in items %}
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="15px 20px" css-class="review-item">
      <mj-column width="100px">
        <mj-image src="{{ item.product_thumbnail_url }}" alt="{{ item.name }}" width="80px" border-radius="6px" />
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="60%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-text font-size="14px" font-weight="600" color="#212529">
          {{ item.name }}
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="12px" color="#6c757d" padding-top="5px">Qty: {{ item.quantity }}</mj-text>
      </mj-column>
      <mj-column width="30%" vertical-align="middle">
        <mj-button
          href="{{ item.review_url }}"
          background-color="#007bff"
          color="#ffffff"
          font-size="12px"
          border-radius="4px"
          padding="8px 16px"
          inner-padding="8px 16px"
        >Escreva uma revisão</mj-button>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endfor %}

    <!-- Incentive (if offered) -->
    {% if incentive_offered %}
    <mj-section background-color="#e7f3ff" padding="20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text font-size="16px" font-weight="600" color="#212529" align="center">🎁 Recompensa de bônus</mj-text>
        <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#212529" align="center" padding-top="10px">
          {{ incentive_details }}
        </mj-text>
        {% if incentive_code %}
        <mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="bold" color="#007bff" align="center" padding-top="10px">Código: {{ incentive_code }}</mj-text>
        {% endif %}
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    {% endif %}

    <!-- Bloco de Apoio -->
    {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}
  </mj-body>
</mjml>

subject: Ihre Bestellung #__POSITOR_0__ hat versandt!
html_content: Ihre Bestellung ist unterwegs! Befehl #{{ order_number }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/order_timeline.mjml' with stages=timeline_stages %} {% if carrier_logo_url %} {% endif %} {{ carrier }} Das Tracking: {{ tracking_number }} Schätzung der Lieferung: {{ estimated_delivery_date }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/cta_button.mjml' with url=tracking_url text="Verfolgen Sie Ihre Sendung" %} Gegenstände in diesem Versand {% for item in items %} {{ item.name }} Qty: {{ item.quantity }} {% endfor %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/address_block.mjml' with address=shipping_address title="Schifffahrt zu" %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}

subject: ¡Tu pedido #0_0_0_ ha sido enviado!
html_content: ¡Tu orden está en camino! Orden #{{ order_number }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/order_timeline.mjml' with stages=timeline_stages %} {% if carrier_logo_url %} {% endif %} {{ carrier }} El rastreo: {{ tracking_number }} Entrega estimada : {{ estimated_delivery_date }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/cta_button.mjml' with url=tracking_url text="Siga su envío" %} Objetos de este envío {% for item in items %} {{ item.name }} Qty: {{ item.quantity }} {% endfor %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/address_block.mjml' with address=shipping_address title="Navegación a" %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}

subject: Votre commande #0_0 a été expédiée!
html_content: Votre commande est en route! Commande #{{ order_number }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/order_timeline.mjml' with stages=timeline_stages %} {% if carrier_logo_url %} {% endif %} {{ carrier }} Le tracking : {{ tracking_number }} Livraison prévue : {{ estimated_delivery_date }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/cta_button.mjml' with url=tracking_url text="Suivez votre expédition" %} Articles dans cette expédition {% for item in items %} {{ item.name }} Qty : {{ item.quantity }} {% endfor %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/address_block.mjml' with address=shipping_address title="Navigation à" %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}

subject: あなたの注文 #{{ order_number }} 発送されました!
html_content: あなたのオーダーは途中です! オーダー #{{ order_number }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/order_timeline.mjml' with stages=timeline_stages %} {% if carrier_logo_url %} {% endif %} {{ carrier }} 追跡: {{ tracking_number }} 予想配達: {{ estimated_delivery_date }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/cta_button.mjml' with url=tracking_url text="あなたの配送を追跡" %} アイテム in this Shipment {% for item in items %} {{ item.name }} トップページ > トップページ > 0 {% endfor %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/address_block.mjml' with address=shipping_address title="SHIPPING TO" %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}

subject: A sua encomenda #0_0_0_0 foi enviada!
html_content: Sua encomenda está a caminho! Ordem #{{ order_number }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/order_timeline.mjml' with stages=timeline_stages %} {% if carrier_logo_url %} {% endif %} {{ carrier }} O rastreamento: {{ tracking_number }} Entrega estimada : {{ estimated_delivery_date }} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/cta_button.mjml' with url=tracking_url text="Acompanhe sua expedição" %} Itens nesta expedição {% for item in items %} {{ item.name }} Qty: {{ item.quantity }} {% endfor %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/address_block.mjml' with address=shipping_address title="Navegação para" %} {% include 'email_system/mjml_components/support_block.mjml' %}
